title: dcg-iye.2
description:
Verify and signoff 4 docs against actual code:
- docs/plans/03a-packs-core.md (partial) → internal/packs/core/
- docs/plans/03a-packs-core-test-harness.md (partial) → internal/packs/core/, e2etest/
- docs/plans/03b-packs-database.md (partial) → internal/packs/database/

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed in commit 0831f04. All 4 docs signed off with deviations documented.
